name: Pork and Squash Foil Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut an 18 by 12-inch piece of heavy foil.
2. Place the pork chop in the center of the lower half of the foil.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Lay squash slices on top of the pork chop.
5. Dot each slice with butter.
6. Sprinkle with brown sugar; drizzle with honey.
7. Fold the upper edge of the foil over to meet the bottom edge, creating a 1/2-inch fold.
8. Smooth the fold and press tightly to seal, allowing room for expansion and heat circulation.
9. Repeat folding and sealing at each end.
10. Place the packet on a baking sheet.
11. Bake in a 425 degree oven for 25-30 minutes or until the pork chop and squash are tender.
